title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NoBroker family as a Backend Developer in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
